rule: Any supported layer may prompt any other supported layer, as long as prompt and answer layers are different.
notes: Hanzi cards should display simplified as primary, with the traditional form in parentheses when it differs.
Reading cards should display pinyin as primary, with zhuyin in parentheses when it differs.
Variation generators should treat gloss_en and translation_en as one effective review layer when they render to the same English text for a given entry.
The full direction set is intentionally open, but these default pairs cover the most useful early-stage reviews.
Variation generators should avoid same-layer cards.
